res_U res_rq_U x1_U norm_out_U Q_in_U K_in_U V_in_U out_mha_U out_res_0_U res_1_U res_1_rq_U x2_U norm_out_1_U mlp_out_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
in_q_1, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of in_q,
in_q_2, 0x14, 32, W, Data signal of in_q,
in_k_1, 0x1c, 32, W, Data signal of in_k,
in_k_2, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of in_k,
in_v_1, 0x28, 32, W, Data signal of in_v,
in_v_2, 0x2c, 32, W, Data signal of in_v,
in_o_1, 0x34, 32, W, Data signal of in_o,
in_o_2, 0x38, 32, W, Data signal of in_o,
in_w_up_1, 0x40, 32, W, Data signal of in_w_up,
in_w_up_2, 0x44, 32, W, Data signal of in_w_up,
in_w_down_1, 0x4c, 32, W, Data signal of in_w_down,
in_w_down_2, 0x50, 32, W, Data signal of in_w_down,

table.keys: Interface, Register Mode, TDATA, TKEEP, TLAST, TREADY, TSTRB, TVALID
Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Usage, HW Info
table.column: s_axi_control, register, offset, name=in_q_1 offset=0x10 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=in_q_2 offset=0x14 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=in_k_1 offset=0x1c range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=in_k_2 offset=0x20 range=32

s_axi_control, register, offset, name=in_v_2 offset=0x2c range=32

s_axi_control, register, offset, name=in_o_2 offset=0x38 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=in_w_up_1 offset=0x40 range=32
s_axi_control, register, offset, name=in_w_up_2 offset=0x44 range=32

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Msg.msg_body: Since the only kind of statements allowed in a canonical dataflow region are variable declarations and function calls, the compiler may not be able to correctly handle the region

Pragma.options: m_axi port=in_w_up offset=slave bundle=gmem0 max_read_burst_length=64 num_read_outstanding=16 depth=147456
m_axi port=in_w_down offset=slave bundle=gmem1 max_read_burst_length=64 num_read_outstanding=16 depth=147456
m_axi port=in_w_up offset=slave bundle=gmem0 max_read_burst_length=64 num_read_outstanding=16 depth=((((192 * 768)) + ((8 / act_0::width)) - 1) / ((8 / act_0::width)))
m_axi port=in_w_down offset=slave bundle=gmem1 max_read_burst_length=64 num_read_outstanding=16 depth=((((192 * 768)) + ((8 / act_0::width)) - 1) / ((8 / act_0::width)))
m_axi port=in_q offset=slave bundle=Q max_read_burst_length=64 num_read_outstanding=16 depth=((((192 * 192)) + ((8 / act_0::width)) - 1) / ((8 / act_0::width)))
m_axi port=in_k offset=slave bundle=K max_read_burst_length=64 num_read_outstanding=16 depth=((((192 * 192)) + ((8 / act_0::width)) - 1) / ((8 / act_0::width)))
m_axi port=in_v offset=slave bundle=V max_read_burst_length=64 num_read_outstanding=16 depth=((((192 * 192)) + ((8 / act_0::width)) - 1) / ((8 / act_0::width)))
m_axi port=in_o offset=slave bundle=OUT_M max_read_burst_length=64 num_read_outstanding=16 depth=((((192 * 192)) + ((8 / act_0::width)) - 1) / ((8 / act_0::width)))
